headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid AVY and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: While the broader market has struggled with the S&P 500 down 2.3% since October 2025, Avery Dennison has surged ahead as its stock price has climbed by 5.4% to $171.47 per share. This run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Packaging Stocks Face Middle East Risks but Fundamentals Support Upside, BofA Says
summary: Packaging stocks face earnings pressure from Middle East risks, yet stable fundamentals support pote
